title: XML Comment
text:
XML Comment XML comments are embedded within tags. Conversion to Struct When converted without the /full switch, comments are ignored. When converted with the /full switch, an XML comment is converted to a Struct called #comment , with annotation xmlClass set to comment . The value is the comment string itself. Example: XML to Struct Conversion: Comment XML code with comment

text

Copy After conversion with /full , string returned by $dbgString : [] [p] = text [$tags] [xmlClass] = element [#comment] = mycomments [$tags] [xmlClass] = comment Copy Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
